title: adinandra dumosa
intro: Adinandra dumosa, also known as the Malay apple tree, is a plant species native to Southeast Asia. The plant is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Adinandra dumosa include its ability to treat fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. In traditional herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, decoctions, and infusions, which are consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
